claim_text: IEA frames AI/data centers as a material electricity demand source requiring power supply and grid planning rather than a pure software demand story.
notes: Supports macro/industry demand lens; not company-specific value capture.

claim_text: EIA AEO2026 includes data-center electricity use as an explicit demand driver and models US electricity demand growth across cases.
notes: Supports that AI power is a real electricity-system issue; not proof of nuclear equity upside.

claim_text: Constellation and Microsoft announced a 20-year power purchase agreement tied to restarting the Crane Clean Energy Center at the former Three Mile Island Unit 1 site.
notes: Strongest public-company value-capture evidence, but detailed contract economics and execution milestones still matter.

claim_text: Google and Kairos Power announced an agreement to bring advanced nuclear power to US grids, targeting a first deployment by 2030 and more by 2035.
notes: Proves hyperscaler demand for advanced nuclear but Kairos is private; public-equity handoff is indirect.

claim_text: Amazon announced nuclear energy agreements including an X-energy relationship and Energy Northwest project pathway to support carbon-free power needs.
notes: Supports offtaker interest; project execution and public-company capture remain separate questions.

claim_text: NRC advanced-reactor public materials show that licensing and pre-application activity are central gates for advanced nuclear deployment.
notes: Supports regulatory gate; use project-specific NRC pages before single-equity actionability.

claim_text: NRC issued construction-permit related public materials for Kairos Hermes, showing advanced nuclear can reach formal regulatory milestones but still faces project delivery risk.
notes: Project-specific status should be refreshed from NRC before use; included to show permitting is a gating evidence path.

claim_text: FERC public materials treat data-center co-location and AI-related power demand as an active regulatory issue, including grid, reliability and cost-allocation questions.
Oklo is a public advanced-nuclear developer, but single-equity actionability depends on regulatory progress, project delivery, future revenue and valuation expectations.
notes: Use company 10-K and latest filings before any single-equity memo; this screen does not rely on current price.
